Input:GoalTimeline.title: Goal Timeline
Input:GoalTimeline.description: The timeline for the goals (e.g. Short-Term (1-2 years), Mid-Term (2-3 years), Long-Term (3-4 years)

Input:GoalCategory.title: Goal Category
Input:GoalCategory.description: The category of goals to suggest (e.g., Career Exploration, Academic Achievement, Leadership Development, Skill Building)

Input:AdditionalContext.title: Additional Context
Input:AdditionalContext.description: Any additional context, preferences, or specific areas of focus for goal suggestions

Input:ContactId.title: Contact Id
Input:ContactId.description: This is an 18-digit record ID for Student’s Contact.
